'''√w-n-b''' ('''wanaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cumbre|cumbre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cumbre|cumbre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-n-b
|-
! Lemma
| wanaba
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || wanabithi || wanabiji || wanabishi || wanabi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || wanabuthuth || wanabujuj || wanabushush || wanab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || wanabuthu || wanabuju || wanabushu || wanabu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || wanabufuth || wanabufuj || wanabufush || wanabuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || wanabethe || wanabeje || wanabeshe || wanabe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || wanabothoth || wanabojoj || wanaboshosh || wanab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || wanabotho || wanabojo || wanabosho || wanabo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || wanabofoth || wanabofoj || wanabofosh || wanabof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wanabïfïf || wanabïfïf || wanabïfïf || wanabïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf || wanabïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || wanabæthæ || wanabæjæ || wanabæshæ || wanabæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || wanabathath || wanabajaj || wanabashash || wanab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || wanabatha || wanabaja || wanabasha || wanaba
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || wanabafath || wanabafaj || wanabafash || wanabaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || wanabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gowanabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokiwanabasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || wanabnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gowanabnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokiwanabnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || wanabshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gowanabnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokiwanabshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || wanabroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gowanabnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokiwanabroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || wanabmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gowanabnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokiwanabmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || wanabsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gowanabnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokiwanabsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || wanabngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gowanabnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokiwanabngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || wanabyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gowanabnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokiwanabyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || wanabyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gowanabnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokiwanabyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || wanabnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gowanabnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokiwanabnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || wanabnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gowanabnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwanabnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || wanabnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gowanabnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwanabnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || wanabshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gowanabnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokiwanabshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || wanabshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gowanabnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwanabshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || wanabshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gowanabnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwanabshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || wanabronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gowanabnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokiwanabronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || wanabroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gowanabnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokiwanabroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || wanabromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gowanabnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwanabromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || wanabmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gowanabnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokiwanabmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || wanabmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gowanabnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokiwanabmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || wanabmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gowanabnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwanabmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || wanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || wænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || howanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || howænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohowanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohowænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || liwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || liliwanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliwænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kowanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kowænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokowanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokowænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kewanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kewænæb
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekewanab
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekewænæb
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
